Friday, June 26, 2026 at 3 PM

Location: Tap Room, 941 W 18TH ST., Houston, TX, 77008, United States

From Eureka Heights Brewery

Event details

item.title: Pet Portrait Sip & Design at Eureka Heights
item.description:
Friday, June 26, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Tap Room, 941 W 18TH ST., Houston, TX, 77008, United States

Join us for a fun afternoon of painting your pet’s portrait while sipping on a delicious selection at the Eureka Heights! 🐾PET PORTRAIT SIP & DESIGN! 🐾 Calling all pet lovers and art enthusiasts! Join us for the most adorable creative event at @eurekaheights! 🎨 What’s Included: • All painting materials • Guided pet portrait session • Tons of fun! Please send a picture of your pet after signing up or bring your favorite four-legged friend (in photo form) and create a masterpiece you’ll treasure forever! No painting experience is necessary – just bring your creativity and be ready to have fun! Event Link

From Eureka Heights Brewery

Event details

item.title: Shop Local Market
item.description:
Saturday, June 27, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: TX

Discover one-of-a-kind gifts, handmade art, lush plants, craft coffee, sweet treats, and more at Shop Local Market’s weekend pop-up!

From Houston Farmers Market

Event details

item.title: Houston Plant Swap/ AJL Adoption Event
item.description:
Saturday, June 27, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: Tap Room, 941 W 18TH ST., Houston, TX, 77008, United States

Calling all plant lovers, join us for our monthly plant swap and market! Come grab a pint and go home with all the plants. This month we’ll be also featuring two local adoption agencies with adoptable cats and dogs from Animal Justice League and Spring Branch Rescue

From Eureka Heights Brewery

Event details

item.title: Shop Local Market
item.description:
Sunday, June 28, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: TX

Discover one-of-a-kind gifts, handmade art, lush plants, craft coffee, sweet treats, and more at Shop Local Market’s weekend pop-up!

From Houston Farmers Market

Event details

item.title: Southern Smoke Dog Show
item.description:
Sunday, June 28, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Tap Room, 941 W 18TH ST., Houston, TX, 77008, United States

Join the Houston Smoke as they put on their second annual Houston Smoke Dog Show! Think you and your K9 companion have what it takes to win over the judges and take home the trophies? Come see us Sunday June 28th for the 2026 Smokin’ Dog Pageant and see! Our 2nd annual team fundraiser is here! We will have plenty of raffle baskets up for grabs and even a fully loaded Rip-It Softball Swag Bag!

From Eureka Heights Brewery

Event details

item.title: Mariachi at the Market with Alamo Tamales
item.description:
Sunday, June 28, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: The Houston Farmers Market, 2520 Airline Drive, Houston, TX, 77009, United States

Enjoy live mariachi music at the Houston Farmers Market on the last Sunday of every month from 12–2 PM, presented in partnership with Alamo Tamales.

From Houston Farmers Market

Event details

Event details

item.title: BATTLE OF THE BADGES
item.description:
Tuesday, June 30, 2026 at 2 PM

? BATTLE OF THE BADGES — JUNE 30, 2:00PM–8:00PM Come donate blood and cast your vote — HPD or HFD, who will win? The Battle of the Badges blood drive takes place Tuesday, June 30 from 2:00–8:00pm at the Historic Houston Heights Fire Station (107 W. 12th St) as part of the city-wide competition running June 28–July 5. Every successful donor receives a special edition baseball cap and a FREE $25 Donor Rewards Store gift card! Use sponsor code HHA8 when scheduling. Click below to sign up and help your team win!   https://www.commitforlife.org/donor/schedules/drive_schedule/416139

From Houston Heights Association

Event details

item.title: The Past Tense Book Club
item.description:
Tuesday, June 30, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: 250 W 19th St Suite D, Houston, TX 77008

From Good on Paper Books

Event details

item.title: Trivia Night
item.description:
Wednesday, July 1, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Tap Room, 941 W 18TH ST., Houston, TX, 77008, United States

It’s the battle of the brains! Join us every Wednesday at 7 PM as we test how much random knowledge you’ve retained since high school. Warning: Side effects may include smugness and unexpected brain farts.  

From Eureka Heights Brewery

Event details

item.title: Gabage and Recycle Pick Up
item.description:
Thursday, July 2, 2026 at 12 AM

From Houston Heights Association

Event details

item.title: Laces Out Run Club
item.description:
Thursday, July 2, 2026 at 5:30 PM

Location: Tap Room, 941 W 18TH ST., Houston, TX, 77008, United States

Every Thursday at 5:30 and 6:30 PM, our Laces Out Run Club members start on a route of their choosing, ranging from a 2, 3.5, 5, or 8 mile run. After their run, they receive $2 off beers the rest of the evening! REWARDS 🎽 10 runs: EH headband 🎽 25 runs: Laces Out shirt 🎽 50 runs: Running shorts 🎽 100 runs: Singlet        

From Eureka Heights Brewery

Event details

Event details

item.title: July 2026 General Meeting
item.description:
Monday, July 13, 2026 at 6:30 PM

Location: Houston Heights City Hall & Fire Station, 107 W. 12th Street, Houston, TX, 77008, United States

Mark your calendars! The Houston Heights Association’s Great American Pie Contest is coming to our General Meeting on Monday, July 13 at 6:30 PM. Think your pie recipe is the best in the Heights? Enter one of our four categories: Sweet Savory Junior Baker Presentation Contestants are required to enter 2 pies for judging, and a panel of 6 judges will decide who takes home bragging rights as the Heights’ top pie baker of 2026. Prizes will be awarded for 1st, 2nd, and 3rd place in each category. There will also be a Best Presentation Award, selected by People’s Choice, so be sure to bring your creativity along with your baking skills! Whether you’re baking or just cheering on your neighbors, everyone is invited to join the fun. Bring your appetite and your community spirit—we can’t wait to see you there! SUBMIT YOUR PIE

From Houston Heights Association

Event details

item.title: August 2026 General Meeting: HHA Night at the Theatre
item.description:
Monday, August 10, 2026 at 6:30 PM

Location: alley theatre, 615 Texas Ave, Houston, tx, 77002

Join us for the Houston Heights Association General Meeting on Wednesday, August 11 at 7:30 PM for a special community night out: HHA Night at the Theatre! We are heading to the Alley Theatre for a thrilling performance of The Girl on the Train. Come early to mix, mingle, and sip a drink with your neighbors before the show begins. Ticket Information: To join our neighborhood block, visit www.alleytheatre.org/the-girl-on-the-train. Be sure to enter the coupon code HHA before choosing your performance date to access our special community arrangement. Event Details: Date: Wednesday, August 11, 2026 Time: 7:30 PM Venue: Alley Theatre Website: www.alleytheatre.org/the-girl-on-the-train

From Houston Heights Association

Event details
